run.name: Build & Deploy docs

head_commit.message:
refactor: move axplat-dyn from arceos to platform (#23)

* Refactor and enhance axplat-dyn platform module

- Removed unused patch for ostool in StarryOS Cargo.lock.
- Updated axalloc dependency version in arceos Cargo.lock and added its package definition.
- Removed axplat-dyn module from Cargo.toml members and adjusted its path.
- Created new axplat-dyn module with Cargo.toml, build.rs, and link.ld files.
- Implemented boot and console functionalities in axplat-dyn.
- Developed block device driver for virtio in axplat-dyn, including PCIe support.
- Added generic timer and IRQ handling for the platform.
- Implemented memory management and power management interfaces.
- Enhanced overall structure and organization of the axplat-dyn module.

* chore: remove axplat-dyn from excluded components in Cargo.toml

* feat: rename affinity and wait-queue packages to arceos-affinity and arceos-wait-queue
